title_es: Mantequilla de Maní: Natural vs. Procesada
hook_en: Which peanut butter do you think is healthier?
hook_es: ¿Cuál mantequilla de maní crees que es más saludable?
key_message: Homemade peanut butter contains only peanuts and salt, while commercial versions often include unhealthy trans fats and added sugar.
visual_elements: Side-by-side jars of homemade and commercial peanut butter
Spoonfuls of each peanut butter to show texture differences
Animated text highlighting 'No Trans Fats' vs. 'Contains Trans Fats'
props_needed: jars of peanut butter (homemade and commercial)
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade peanut butter (peanuts, salt) vs. PROCESSED: Commercial peanut butter (hydrogenated oils, sugar, mono-diglycerides) — Many commercial PBs contain hydrogenated oils (trans fats) and added sugar

title_en: The Truth about Peanut Butter Ingredients!
title_es: ¡La Verdad sobre los Ingredientes de la Mantequilla de Maní!
hook_en: Can you guess what's hiding in your peanut butter?
hook_es: ¿Puedes adivinar qué se esconde en tu mantequilla de maní?
key_message: Commercial peanut butter often contains unnecessary additives like hydrogenated oils and sugar, unlike the simple, nutritious homemade version.
visual_elements: Quick pan over various peanut butter jars
Ingredients being added to a blender: peanuts, salt
Graphics showing 'Hydrogenated oils' with a red cross
Healthy vs. processed peanut butter on toast
_source_food_context: • HEALTHY: Homemade peanut butter (peanuts, salt) vs. PROCESSED: Commercial peanut butter (hydrogenated oils, sugar, mono-diglycerides) — Many commercial PBs contain hydrogenated oils (trans fats) and added sugar
